description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: Prime Agents’ internal TRC management systems should enable them to maintain continuous sufficiency of the Prime Agent’s held TRC against its official Aggregate RRC. This requires real-time or near real-time comparison and internal alerting mechanisms to prevent and address potential shortfalls.

Primes must ensure that their internal TRC management systems maintain comprehensive, verifiable internal records of all TRC components, related transactions, and compliance activities to support internal governance and external verification processes, such as the submission of TRC Reports to Core GovOps. See [A.2.
